use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING DYSLIPIDEMIA AND DYSLIPOPROTEINEMIA USING A DOSAGE FORM THAT CAN PROVIDE AN EFFECTIVE AMOUNT OF FENOFIBRATE TO A PATIENT IN A FASTED STATE WHICH IS AT LEAST 90% OF THE AUC AMOUNT PROVIDED BY THE DOSAGE FORM
